And it was crazy, as freelancer new to this field years ago, to get professional-level criticism from PHD candidates on my early vizzes
As someone who didn't go to school for this, public criticism (sometimes very harsh comments on junkcharts or flowingdata) WAS my education

RE Criticizing graphics in public: 

I welcome any and all criticism of data graphics created by @vocativ viz team
